title: lotus corniculatus subsp. minor
intro: Lotus corniculatus subsp. minor, also known as the small bird's-foot trefoil, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of lotus corniculatus subsp. minor include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for conditions such as arthritis, digestive disorders, and respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
